exercises.title: Profile a Script
exercises.description: Run a CPU profiler on a small program and identify the hottest function.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can point at the top CPU consumers.

exercises.title: Load Test a Local Server
exercises.description: Push a simple HTTP server with ab or wrk and find the first saturation point.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can see throughput and latency degrade as load rises.

exercises.title: Generate a Flame Graph
exercises.description: Capture a CPU profile for a Node or Python service and turn it into a flame graph.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can visually trace time spent in the hot path.

exercises.title: Find an N+1 Query
exercises.description: Instrument a small ORM-backed app and reduce repeated queries by batching or preloading.
exercises.expected_outcome: Query count drops after the optimization.

exercises.title: Run a k6 Ramp Test
exercises.description: Ramp load from zero to high concurrency and record P99 latency over time.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can identify the inflection point where latency rises sharply.

exercises.title: Benchmark Connection Pooling
exercises.description: Compare a service with and without PgBouncer or a similar pooler under load.
exercises.expected_outcome: Pooling changes throughput and latency in measurable ways.
